title: Heredoc syntax with variable interpolation
description: Heredoc strings (<<<) interpolate variables like double-quoted strings. In SQL or HTML contexts this creates injection risks that are harder to spot than regular string concatenation.
explanation: Heredoc syntax interpolates PHP variables, making it easy to accidentally inject unsanitized values into SQL or HTML. Use parameterized queries for SQL and Smarty templates for HTML output.
fix: For SQL, use parameterized queries with ? placeholders. For HTML, use Smarty templates. If heredoc is needed for static text, use nowdoc (<<<'EOT') which does not interpolate.
